title: GameStop Q4 2023 Earnings Miss
text: GameStop reported disappointing fourth-quarter 2023 results, falling short on both profitability and revenue metrics. The gaming retailer posted earnings per share of $0.22, trailing analyst expectations of $0.29. On the revenue side, GameStop generated $1.79 billion in sales, representing a significant shortfall against the projected $2.05 billion. The revenue miss was particularly substantial, coming in 12.49% worse than the analyst estimate. This indicated that GameStop's business continued facing headwinds in the physical game retail market. The earnings were published by InvestorPlace on March 26, 2024, using automated analysis powered by TradeSmith data to quickly disseminate quarterly results to investors.
